title: Principal Instructional Designer at Mahendra's Institute

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Mahendra's Institute
jsonLd.description:
Mahendra's Institute invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Pimpri-Chinchwad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Mahendra's Institute:
Mahendra's Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahendra's Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
